subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou by Whose Name the trees have been planted, the fruits have appeared, and the righteous have spoken amidst the wicked [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک غرست الاشجار و ظهرت الاثمار و نطق الابرار بین الفجار بما
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
